name: tmux-orchestrator
shortDescription: Multi-agent teams in tmux windows. No frameworks — just bash.
longDescription: Spawn Claude Code agents in isolated tmux windows with their own context, git worktrees, and task injection. Two-way communication via tmux send-keys. Auto-approve stuck permission prompts. Self-compacting persistent agents. The registry is the window list.

skills.name: orchestrate
skills.description: Manage a team of Claude Code agents in tmux windows

skills.name: persistent
skills.description: Always-on orchestrator with self-compaction and task queues
